framework: A path qualifies only when >=3 prominent, proven people in the field visibly share the capability, each with a resolving link — the pattern across standouts is the evidence, not market demand. Ranked by strength of that pattern. Curated editorial, not DOL-derived.

paths.what_it_is: Turning real plant incidents into rigorous, publicly taught case studies that explain root cause, not just what broke.
paths.why_it_signals: It proves an engineer can extract a transferable lesson from a failure and teach it well enough that other plants change how they operate.

paths.path: Public technical teaching of process fundamentals
paths.what_it_is: Distilling core chemical engineering concepts into free screencasts, videos, or courses used by students and practitioners worldwide.
paths.why_it_signals: Explaining a hard technical concept clearly enough for millions of independent learners to actually get it is a much higher bar than passing a class in it.

paths.path: Building process optimization software adopted industry-wide
paths.what_it_is: Developing and publishing numerical solvers or modeling frameworks for process design and optimization that become standard tools across the field.
paths.why_it_signals: It shows the engineer can turn a mathematical method into working software robust enough that other engineers build their own work on top of it.
